name: Peanut Butter Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, p-nut butter, brown sugar, and eggs.
2. Sift in the flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well until combined.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal parts. Roll each part out between layers of wax paper or saran wrap.
4. Melt 12 oz of semi-sweet morsels (Morsels) over hot water.
5. Spread half of the melted chocolate evenly over one half of the cookie dough.
6. Place the other half of the chocolate on top and roll up the dough like a jelly roll, securing it in the wax paper.
7. Chill thoroughly before proceeding to baking.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Slice rounds from the rolled dough using a sharp knife.
10. Place the cookie slices on an ungreased baking sheet.
11. Bake for 8-12 minutes, or until lightly browned on the bottom edges.
